title: Station Comparison
description: Compare yield, throughput, and duration across test stations

targets.rawSql: SELECT station_id, round(100.0 * count(*) FILTER (WHERE outcome = 'passed') / count(*), 1) AS yield_pct FROM runs WHERE started_at BETWEEN '${__from:date}' AND '${__to:date}' GROUP BY station_id ORDER BY yield_pct DESC

SELECT station_id, round(avg(epoch(ended_at - started_at)), 1) AS avg_duration_s FROM runs WHERE started_at BETWEEN '${__from:date}' AND '${__to:date}' AND ended_at IS NOT NULL GROUP BY station_id ORDER BY avg_duration_s

SELECT station_id, station_name, count(*) AS runs, round(100.0 * count(*) FILTER (WHERE outcome = 'passed') / count(*), 1) AS yield_pct, round(avg(epoch(ended_at - started_at)), 1) AS avg_duration_s, round(quantile_cont(epoch(ended_at - started_at), 0.95), 1) AS p95_duration_s FROM runs WHERE started_at BETWEEN '${__from:date}' AND '${__to:date}' AND ended_at IS NOT NULL GROUP BY station_id, station_name ORDER BY runs DESC
